task.title: Harden semantic build traceability and change classification
task.summary: Require semantic changes to trace to accepted builds and add change-class routing rules for product, system, task, code bugfix, maintenance/audit, security, and publication changes.

goal.outcome: Task closure, implementation validation, and publication cannot proceed for semantic changes without accepted upstream build traceability and change-class propagation evidence.
acceptance: Build/roadmap/task APIs model change class and upstream accepted build refs where required.
Graph flags semantic code/docs/roadmap changes without accepted build coverage.
Task-close blocks or warns according to policy when accepted build traceability is missing.
Feedback loop docs/skill use Change row terminology consistently.
non_goals: Do not force a new build for generated/runtime/mechanical-only changes.
verification: codewiki_state/graph shows missing-build drift in fixture

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Task closure must block unless a passing task-close validation with immutable proof exists.

evidence_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs catches `Task close blocked` error from `codewiki_task close`.
tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs creates task-close validation reports before close paths and passes.

summary: TASK-082/TASK-084 task close now blocks without passing task-close validation and immutable proof.

source: user request: enforce commit proof so next agent cannot miss rule

evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs now catches missing task-close proof before closure.
tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs exercises successful close only after task-close validation reports exist.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/task.ts scans `.codewiki/validation/*.json` for passing task-close validation with immutable proof before closing.
System validation gateway docs state `codewiki_task close` must block without proof.
notes: This prevents next agent from closing dirty pre-commit work after implementation validation only. Actual commit creation remains a separate step before task-close validation can pass in real work.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs now catches missing task-close proof before closure.
tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs exercises successful close only after task-close validation reports exist.
code_change_evidence: src/application/task.ts scans `.codewiki/validation/*.json` for passing task-close validation with immutable proof before closing.
System validation gateway docs state `codewiki_task close` must block without proof.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Task-close tool path cannot close without gateway proof.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `closeCodewikiTask` now requires a passing `task-close` validation report for the task with fresh_context=true, clean=true, and immutable proof.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Smoke tests cover blocked close without validation and allowed close with task-close validation.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs asserts `codewiki_task close` blocks without validation; tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs creates task-close validation before close smoke paths.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue enforcing the commit-proof rule so future agents cannot close tasks from dirty implementation evidence.
implemented_changes: Added task-close validation proof gate to closeCodewikiTask.
Updated smoke tests to block close without proof and require task-close validation before successful closes.
Documented task close proof requirement in validation gateway spec.
non_goals_preserved: Did not allow dirty working-tree digest for task-close.
remaining_risks: Need fresh validation and later commit/trailer audit enforcement.

risks: Existing tasks marked done before this gate need reconciliation/backfill of commit proof.
The gate uses local validation report lookup; future audit task should verify commit trailers match the proof SHA.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-082 Harden semantic build traceability and change classification implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-082/TASK-084 task close now blocks without passing task-close validation and immutable proof.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
